description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic, multi-tone color scheme with white, gray, black, and yellow accents. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials with layered panels and a prominent, sculpted midsole that provides both style and support. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and the lacing system is traditional with flat white laces. Subtle yellow graphic elements add a sense of motion and energy to the design, while the outsole is thick and robust, likely offering good traction. The overall silhouette is modern and sporty, suitable for urban environments and casual wear. The interior appears cushioned, enhancing comfort for extended use.
description: A modern high-top sneaker with layered white, gray, black, and yellow panels, featuring a padded collar, flat laces, and a thick sculpted sole for comfort and style.
description_view_0: Side view showing layered panels, yellow graphic accents, and the sculpted midsole with a visible black swoosh-like design.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat white laces, padded tongue, and the rounded toe with yellow detailing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the layered construction, more yellow accents, and the continuation of the sculpted sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, heel support structure, and subtle yellow graphics wrapping around the back.
